---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-01"
---
```{r}
set.seed(100)

# Design parameters
reps <- 7
ntrt <- 8
nsim <- 1000

alpha_tilde <- 0.6   # FIXED name

# Function to generate RCBD
generate_rcbd <- function(reps, ntrt,
                          mu = 0,
                          sd_block = 5,
                          sd_error = 10,
                          effect = 0.6) {

  dat <- expand.grid(
    Rep = factor(1:reps),
    Rootstock = factor(1:ntrt)
  )

  beta_j <- rnorm(reps, 0, sd_block)

  tau <- c(0, rep(effect, ntrt - 1))

  eps <- rnorm(nrow(dat), mean = 0, sd = sd_error)

  rep_idx <- as.integer(dat$Rep)
  trt_idx <- as.integer(dat$Rootstock)

  # FIXED indexing
  dat$y <- mu +
           tau[trt_idx] +
           beta_j[rep_idx] +
           eps

  dat
}

# Store p-values
p_values <- numeric(nsim)

for (s in 1:nsim) {

  dat <- generate_rcbd(
    reps = reps,
    ntrt = ntrt,
    effect = 5   # this defines the true treatment effect (power setting)
  )

  fit <- aov(y ~ Rootstock + Rep, data = dat)

  p_values[s] <- summary(fit)[[1]]["Rootstock", "Pr(>F)"]
}

# POWER (not Type I error)
power_hat <- mean(p_values < alpha_tilde)

power_hat
```
```{r}
set.seed(10)
n_simulations <- 5000

# Treatments and Blocks
n_treatments <- 8 
n_blocks <- 7

# Define Tau variance
tau_var <- 0.6

# Building formula
RCBD_simulation <- function() {
  
  # Build the treatment and block structures
  treatments <- rep(1:n_treatments, times = n_blocks)
  blocks <- rep(1:n_blocks, each = n_treatments)
  
  # Tau: cetnered and scaled to exact target variance
  tau_raw <- c(-3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3, 4)
  tau_centered <- tau_raw - mean(tau_raw)
  tau_scaled <- tau_centered * sqrt(tau_var / mean(tau_centered^2))
  
  mu <- 0 
  beta <- rep(rnorm(n_blocks, mean = 0, sd = 1), each = n_treatments)
  sigma <- rnorm(n_treatments * n_blocks, mean = 0, sd = 1)
  
  y <- mu + tau_scaled[treatments] + beta + sigma
  
  # Build the data frame 
  sim_data <- data.frame(
    y = y, 
    treatment = as.factor(treatments), 
    block = as.factor(blocks)
  )
  
  # Fit RCBD model
  model <- aov(y ~ treatment + block, data = sim_data)
  p_value <- summary(model)[[1]]["treatment", "Pr(>F)"]
  return(p_value)
}

  # Run multiple simulations
  results <- replicate(n_simulations, RCBD_simulation())
  results_df <- data.frame(p_value = results)
  
  # Summary output
  head(results_df)
  summary(results_df)
  cat("Significant results: ", sum(results_df$p_value < 0.05), "\n")
  cat("Estimated Power: " , mean(results_df$p_value < 0.05), "\n")

```
